failure_analysis.T12: LLM-layer brand guardrail is probabilistic. Noguchi is less recognised than Togo/Eames so the model returned catalog results instead of declining. Fix: add 'noguchi' to Python-layer OUT_OF_SCOPE_TRIGGERS or extend brand blocklist.
failure_analysis.T17: No armchairs in the catalog carry the 'Minimalist' style tag. This is a catalog coverage gap, not a code bug. Fix: expand catalog data or add a style-fallback in catalog_search when zero results are returned.
failure_analysis.T21: T21 routes through run_agent() (free-text path) which does not call layout_fit_check. The layout tool only fires inside design_room(). Fix: route T21 through design_room() with a synthetic 150x150cm brief entry.
